PlayStatID.description: The unique ID of the PlayStat on the play

PlayID.description: The unique ID of the play in which the PlayStat occurred

Sequence.description: The order in which the play stat was registered to the Play.

PlayerID.description: The unique PlayerID of the player whose stats are tied to the play. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their entire career

Name.description: The Name of the Player whose stats this represents.

Team.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the team the player belongs to

Opponent.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the opponent team of the player who recorded the stat

HomeOrAway.description: Whether the Player was Home or Away (possible values: HOME, AWAY)

Direction.description: The Direction this Play occurred (possible values: Left, Middle, Right)

Updated.description: The database generated timestamp of when this PlayStat was last updated (in US Eastern time)

Created.description: The database generated timestamp of when this PlayStat was first created (in US Eastern Time)

PassingAttempts.description: Total passes thrown by the player on the play

PassingCompletions.description: Total passing completions by the player on the play

PassingYards.description: Total passing yards by the player on the play

PassingTouchdowns.description: Total passing touchdowns thrown by the player on the play

PassingInterceptions.description: Total interceptions thrown by the player on the play

PassingSacks.description: The total number of times the player was sacked on the play

PassingSackYards.description: Total yards lost by the player as a result of being sacked on the play

RushingAttempts.description: Rushing attempts by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

RushingYards.description: Total rushing yards by the player on the play

RushingTouchdowns.description: Total rushing touchdowns by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

ReceivingTargets.description: Total receiving targets by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

Receptions.description: Total receptions by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

ReceivingYards.description: Total receiving yards by the player on the play

ReceivingTouchdowns.description: Total receiving touchdowns by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

Fumbles.description: Times the player fumbled on the play

FumblesLost.description: Fumbles lost by the player on the play

TwoPointConversionAttempts.description: Total two point conversion attempts by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

TwoPointConversionPasses.description: Total successful two point conversion passes by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

TwoPointConversionRuns.description: Total two point conversion rushes by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

TwoPointConversionReceptions.description: Total successful two point conversion receptions by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

TwoPointConversionReturns.description: Total successful two point conversion returns by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

SoloTackles.description: Total defensive solo (unassisted) tackles by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

AssistedTackles.description: Total defensive assisted tackles by the player on the play

TacklesForLoss.description: Tackles for loss of yards by the player on the play. Note: These are tackles behind the line of scrimmage for loss of yards (including sacks) - also this field is expected to be 1 or 0

Sacks.description: Total Sacks by this player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

SackYards.description: Total sack yards by this player on the play

PassesDefended.description: Total passes defended by the player on the play

Safeties.description: Total defensive safeties by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

FumblesForced.description: Fumbles forced by the player on the play

FumblesRecovered.description: Defensive fumbles recovered by the player on the play

FumbleReturnYards.description: Fumble recoveries returned yards by the player on the play

FumbleReturnTouchdowns.description: Fumble recoveries returned for touchdowns by the player on the play

Interceptions.description: Interceptions by the player on the play

InterceptionReturnYards.description: Interception return yards by the player on the play

InterceptionReturnTouchdowns.description: Interception return touchdowns by the player on the play

PuntReturns.description: Total punts returned by the player on the play

PuntReturnYards.description: Total punt return yards by the player on the play

PuntReturnTouchdowns.description: Punt returns for touchdowns by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

KickReturns.description: Kicks returned by the player on the play

KickReturnYards.description: Kicks return yards by the player on the play

KickReturnTouchdowns.description: Kicks returned for touchdowns by the player on the play

BlockedKicks.description: Blocked kicks by the player on the play. Note: BlockedKicks include Field Goals and Punts but NOT Extra Points

BlockedKickReturns.description: Blocked kick recovery returns by the player on the play

BlockedKickReturnYards.description: Blocked kick recovery return yards by the player on the play

BlockedKickReturnTouchdowns.description: Blocked kick recovery return touchdowns by the player on the play

FieldGoalReturns.description: Field goal returns by the player on the play

FieldGoalReturnYards.description: Field goal return yards by the player on the play. Note: This field excludes blocked field goals

FieldGoalReturnTouchdowns.description: Field goal return touchdowns by the player on the play. Note: This field excludes blocked field goals

Kickoffs.description: Total kickoffs by this player on the play

KickoffYards.description: Gross kickoff yards by the player on the play

KickoffTouchbacks.description: Kickoff touchbacks by the player on the play

Punts.description: Total number of punts by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

PuntYards.description: Total gross punt yards by the player on the play

PuntTouchbacks.description: Total punt touchbacks by the player on the play. Note: this field is expected to be either 1 or 0

PuntsHadBlocked.description: Total punts by the player that were blocked on the play. Note: this field is expected to be 1 or 0

FieldGoalsAttempted.description: Field goals attempted by the player on the play

FieldGoalsMade.description: Field goals made by the player on the play

FieldGoalsYards.description: Field goal yards attempted by the player on the play

FieldGoalsHadBlocked.description: Field goals attempted by the player that were blocked on the play

ExtraPointsAttempted.description: Extra points attempted by the player on the play

ExtraPointsMade.description: Extra points made by the player on the play

ExtraPointsHadBlocked.description: Extra point attempts by the player that were blocked on the play

Penalties.description: Indicates the number of penalties against a player on a play. Note: This serves as a placeholder for data intended to be added in the future

PenaltyYards.description: Total penalty yards enforced against the player on the play
